flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bellevue College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (9.8k → 7.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bellevue College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bellevue College are 29% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($56.3k vs $43.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bellevue College rose 14% between 2007 and 2010 (61.2% → 69.6%).
